_comment_canary_deployments: Rolling Releases are enabled via git.deploymentEnabled. Enable gradual traffic shifting in Vercel dashboard > Settings > Git > Deployment Policies for the main branch. See docs/CANARY_DEPLOYMENTS.md for health-gated rollout configuration.
_comment_otel_tracing: OpenTelemetry: Sentry transactions (lib/observability.ts) can be forwarded to an OTLP-compatible collector by configuring SENTRY_DSN and setting up a Sentry-to-OTel bridge in your observability stack.
